## Summary

## Files changed

## Why this change is needed

## Validation performed
- [ ] Local review completed
- [ ] Links checked where relevant
- [ ] YAML or Markdown syntax checked where relevant
- [ ] Repo audit run when the change affects repository structure, metadata, workflows, or docs

## Public-safe content check
- [ ] No raw standards text added
- [ ] No private handoff files added
- [ ] No source PDFs or large binaries added
- [ ] No release ZIPs added

## Checklist
- [ ] Scope is limited to the stated change
- [ ] Naming and wording match existing repo conventions
- [ ] Public paths and skill slugs were preserved unless a real defect required a change
- [ ] Related documentation was updated if needed
